reviews.review_description:
My daughters been playing this game faithfully for months now. She has a bird named Pip, and Pip feels like he’s genuinely apart of our family since we’re always hearing what he’s up too and what new things he learned. Her “daily care” became apart of her nightly routine, she never went to bed without doing Pip’s care for the day, she put a lot of time & energy into good old pip! However, one day she accidentally fell asleep before she got to do her “daily care”, and considering we know how much her streak & pip mean to her- her dad spent over an hour trying to make sure she got her daily check mark. Long story short, he tried his best but didn’t do it properly & she lost her streak. She was devastated, as we all would be after putting 120+ days into this game! 
After a few days of heart break her dad reached out to the developers on the off chance there was any way to save her streak- and that’s exactly what they did! I’m the mom so I don’t understand the logistics behind what they did, but they told him to reach out in 1-2 weeks and they’d help reset her to where she should be. She continued her daily care as usual & as promised they were able to get her exactly where she was like she never fell asleep 🙌😂 I know it might seem silly to outsiders but it’s something she loves and puts a lot of time into so I was just as devastated for her so there were no words for how much i appreciated them taking the time to get her back where she was. They definitely made a little girls whole year when she went on & saw her streak was back! It’s clearly a great game worth a lot of time- but the people behind the game are angels!

reviews.review_title: Cute but don't spend money for Cats!
reviews.review_description:
I am really disappointed. This honestly feels unjust. I spent over a month using the app and saving coins to adopt a cat. With only 10 coins a day, reaching 900 coins for adoption was taking forever. Since I really wanted a cat, I decided to buy the $20 Harmony pack to finally get the cat and extra coins. After I had already bought the coins and went to adopt the cat, that’s when it said the cat can only be petted and rests. It was too late then. Aside from giving it a piece of kibble, it just walks around. No games, no activities, no real interaction.

Right now, it feels like $20 just to watch a cat walk around.

After all that time and anticipation, paying $20 for something so limited feels misleading, or at the very least not clearly explained. I also tried to get a refund but couldn’t because it’s an in-app purchase, which makes this even more frustrating. For that price, I could have bought a full game with far more content.

I hope the developers either improve this feature or are more transparent a
bout what users are actually getting.

Beware! You practically get the same interaction just going to the adoption station, so save your money and don’t even bother getting a cat until they update this app more.

I truly appreciate the kind developers response. I sure am looking forward to maybe dangling a feather from a stick and letting the cat(s) play.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, just to be clear: before anyone purchases a cat, they see a disclaimer that cats are in early access and support caressing, eating and sleeping behaviors.

We've actually put a lot of work into all of these and a lot of players tell us they love it. I've owned three lazy cats and honestly, they spent most of their time eating and sleeping.

We will absolutely add more interactions in the coming months, especially exploration, play, interactions with other pets and grabbing (taking the cat with your hands). Bear with us!

reviews.review_description: Forever pets is a really fun game. I enjoy it so much. Me and my brother take turns playing games in VR, and I always do forever pets. My favorite pet is Tropico the bird, he is so sweet. My real pet just gave birth, and playing forever pets remind me to play with them every day, feed them every day, and love them every day!

i love this game sm. my bird is so cute but feeding her is hard work. also, at LEAST give us a starter cat because some people dont have three friends to invite, (uhh.. totally not me, hehe..) and i want a cat SO bad. but this is still a fun game to enjoy life with a pet. ty :3                                

update: i got a cat, lucy. i ADORE her, but my bird, aria, gets scared whenever lucy walks near 😭 but, im hoping to see the ability to play with cats soon!! :]]

reviews.review_title: Lots of potential for this cute game
reviews.review_description:
I really love the stress free nature of this game. I try to play every day to complete tasks and collect my coins. I did purchase one of the packages, so I'm getting closer to being able to adopt a kitty soon!

Looking forward to future updates as I see so much potential with this game for those of us who love animals and taking care of our pets. I do have a bit of a phobia of birds though, so this has been a fun way for me to have a pet bird without being freaked out when it flies around 😅

Just started playing recently, immediatly hooked. It feels so incredibly being early to such an amazing game. I look forward to watching the game grow and am already obsessed with the pets!! The developers are insanely amazing people and I am really enjoying everything so far!!
this game is really cool because it does cool things like feed animals and you can do it in real life to i give it a 10\10

This game is AWESOME I'm still voting it a 5 but I am disappointed of the cats because it's  900 COINS It will take me days probably weeks to get that many coins and I wish I could restart my game so I can switch out my bird but when I I download it and wait a day and download it it STILL has the SAME bird and nothing changed Please just make at least one cat free and I can't get anyone to give me boost

I love this game but I just got an a Julis sorry I don’t know how to spell his name but i bought the 10 harmony pack and I bought him when I did he wasn’t shy he was a normal cat he let me pet him he trusted me but i wanted to gain the trust and he is 5 years old I thought I was getting a kitten

developer_response.body:
Hi again ^^ Yes, the cat personalities are work-in-progress while the game is in Early Access. But we promise that it's coming, we want to make them very unique!
Kittens that grow up: we don't have those yet. They will come via the Kickstarter and you will be able to breed them.

reviews.review_title: No 5th star until I can pick the cats up
reviews.review_description:
This is undoubtedly the most appealing virtual pet app so far. Would like to be able to pick the cats up, hold them and pet them while holding. Would also be cool if there were free locomotion instead of the railing thing, which I don't love, mostly because it's a bit glitchy.

But picking cats up is important. Also would like to be able to just sort of grab a leg and give it a wiggle, like goof with em to get their attention. Nothing mean.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, this is absolutely on our to-do list. It's not a simple feature, which is why we haven't built this yet.
If you want grabbing of cats to arrive faster, the way to motivate us isnt to give us a four-star review. We're just two people trying to make a lot of players happy. Many of them want different things, so we prioritize players who ask nicely 😉

Amazing game, very wholesome and sweet, but i have a few complaints. For starters the money you get for the golden note is not nearly enough for what the game asks for, for new pets, food, and deccor. Second, i bought chess and it took all of my money, which wicked because i was saving for a cat. Then i was trying to play chess, but no matter what i did i couldnt get the pieces to move, which is not worth it for all your money. Very good game but the gliches make the game infereating.

developer_response.body:
Thanks and sorry about this. Chess isn’t actually released yet, so if it took your musical notes that’s a bug on our side. It definitely shouldn’t have charged you or let you buy it. We’ll restore what you lost and compensate you. Please message us on Discord with your in-game name so we can fix it quickly: https://discord.gg/XtCBaJhqR6
Also noted on golden note balance, we’re actively tuning that.
